regulation_name: Health Products (Advertisement of Therapeutic Products) Regulations
citation: Health Products (Advertisement of Therapeutic Products) Regulations — Regulation 4
summary: Therapeutic product ads must not claim to treat, prevent, or cure diseases unless HSA-approved indications are reflected.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Disease treatment, prevention, cure, or prescription-only medicine positioning. ACTION: REJECT — remove unapproved therapeutic claims. CHECK: Headlines, pack shots, testimonials, and disease names in copy. ESCALATE IF: Scheduled medicine, serious disease, or Rx-only product referenced.
